title: Atomicity gap: name written before member-patch store error
description: Trigger: Space/set patch {"name":"New","members/x":{"role":"admin"}} where upsert_space_member_with_role returns a DB error. Phase 2 writes name first (update_space_props succeeds), then apply_member_patch fails. Result: notUpdated is returned but the name change has already been persisted — RFC 8620 §7.1 violated for server errors. Pre-existing issue not introduced by this commit, but the commit claims "space_set atomicity" without acknowledging this remaining gap. Users will observe name-changed + notUpdated and file issues. Needs acknowledgment in commit message or doc comment; proper fix requires a transaction across update_space_props + upsert_space_member_with_role.
